snippet: At a minimum, these policies and procedures must: including a commitment to elected government, the rule of law, equal rights for all before the law, freedom of religion, freedom of speech and association and the values of openness and tolerance ensure that a record of all visitors to the school is kept in the event of a school emergency or any future investigation align with relevant department policies and procedures. Further guidance on developing local policies and procedures for visitors in schools is available on the Guidance tab. A Visitors policy template (staff login required) External Link is available on the School Policy Template Portal. Schools can modify the template to suit their local circumstances.
